description.value: Price 18,000 gp; Slot none; CL 6th; Weight 1 lb.; Aura moderate abjuration DESCRIPTION This wayfinder is made of magically hardened glass, through which the complex inner matrix of the compass can be seen. Once per day, the wielder of a wayfinder of the planes can choose one of the following alignments: chaotic, evil, good, or lawful. For 1 hour thereafter, the wayfinder of the planes creates a magic circle effect against the chosen alignment, centered on the wayfinder. Once selected, the alignment of the magic circle effect can’t be changed until the effect recharges the next day. CONSTRUCTION REQUIREMENTS Cost 9,000 gp; Feats Craft Wondrous Item; Spells light, magic circle against chaos, magic circle against evil, magic circle against good, magic circle against law
